name: ai-climate-impact
description: Estimates and displays the CO₂ and water consumption impact of your AI prompts in the status bar. Works with Cursor hooks to track energy consumption per model.

aiClimate.heatMapGreenMax.description: Fixed gCO2 upper bound for green (low). If set with heatMapYellowMax, overrides percentile-based thresholds.

aiClimate.heatMapYellowMax.description: Fixed gCO2 upper bound for yellow (medium). Red = above this. Used only if heatMapGreenMax is also set.

aiClimate.resetStatsOnNewMonth.description: When enabled, cumulative status-bar totals (CO₂, water, tokens, request count) reset automatically at the start of each calendar month. Per-day impact logs are not cleared.

aiClimate.heatMapHistoryMonths.description: How many past months you can step through in the heat map (including the current month). Older months are not shown.
